core_skills: C#, Angular, JavaScript frameworks, HTML5, CSS3
skill_match_scores: C#:0.0, Angular:1.0, JavaScript frameworks:0.5, HTML5:0.5, CSS3:0.5
must_have_quals: Bachelor's Degree in Computer Science, At least 2 years of software development experience using C#, Angular or similar JavaScript framework, HTML5, CSS3, SQL, GitHub, Experience with software development life cycle (SDLC) including release management, Excellent analytical, written and oral communication skills, Excellent computer skills
preferred_quals: Prior experience using Azure and Entity Framework is a plus, Prior experience modernizing systems is a plus
core_responsibilities: Contribute to software development team(s) for one or multiple software applications or initiatives, Build software applications and features in an Agile environment by following our software development lifecycle (SDLC) process, Develop applications in a hybrid and cloud native setting utilizing development skills that include object-oriented programming (C#), databases (SQL), Entity Framework (EF), Angular, and web applications (ASP.NET), Contribute to requirements gathering, design, development, testing, release, and maintenance support of applications, Collaborate with team members regarding projects, development, tools, and training, Perform high level end-user support including feature training and troubleshooting for applications, Contribute to the software validation process through development, review, and/or execution of test plan/cases/scripts, Provide technical assistance for junior team members, Learn patterns, approaches, and business practices across multiple development teams
job_summary: Medpace is a full-service clinical contract research organization (CRO) that accelerates the global development of safe and effective medical therapeutics. They are seeking a Software Engineer to contribute to software development teams, modernize internal systems, and support applications in an Agile environment.
